completed_tasks.title: Add pointer event handlers to PullToRefresh.svelte
completed_tasks.description: Add handlePointerDown, handlePointerMove, handlePointerUp, and handleLostPointerCapture handler functions to PullToRefresh.svelte. All four handlers must guard on pointerType === 'mouse' to prevent double-fire on hybrid/touch devices.
completed_tasks.done_when: Four pointer event handlers are registered in onMount and cleaned up on destroy. All handlers filter on pointerType === 'mouse'. setPointerCapture is called on pointerdown.

completed_tasks.title: Add CSS cursor feedback and user-select suppression
completed_tasks.description: Add isPointerDragging boolean state variable. Apply cursor:grab at rest and cursor:grabbing + user-select:none during drag behind @media (pointer: fine).
completed_tasks.done_when: Desktop (fine pointer) shows cursor:grab at rest, cursor:grabbing + user-select:none during drag. No cursor changes on touch devices.

completed_tasks.title: Add unit tests for pointer gesture lifecycle
completed_tasks.description: Add describe('PullToRefresh pointer gesture', ...) block covering seven scenarios: gesture triggers refresh, retracts below threshold, pointerType filtering, setPointerCapture, lostpointercapture cancel, scrollTop > 0 guard, isRefreshing block.
completed_tasks.done_when: All new pointer gesture tests pass. Existing touch tests unchanged and passing.

completed_tasks.title: Add E2E test for desktop PTR mouse gesture
completed_tasks.description: Add @smoke-tagged Playwright test using page.mouse API with desktop viewport to verify desktop PTR gesture.
completed_tasks.done_when: New E2E test passes in Chromium. Existing touch PTR test unchanged and passing.

history.note: Feature initiated: Enable pull-to-refresh on desktop viewports. Currently PTR only handles touch events, so mouse/trackpad users on desktop have no way to trigger the gesture.
Advanced to discovery. Routing to product-manager for requirements gathering and exec plan creation.
Advanced to design. Routing to principal-engineer for technical design.
Advanced to tasks. Broke design into 4 tasks: T1 pointer handlers, T2 CSS cursor/user-select, T3 unit tests, T4 E2E test.
Starting T1: Add pointer event handlers to PullToRefresh.svelte
Starting T2: Add CSS cursor feedback and user-select suppression
Starting T3: Add unit tests for pointer gesture lifecycle
Starting T4: Add E2E test for desktop PTR mouse gesture
All 4 tasks built. Routing to build-specialist for quality gate verification.
Build verification passed. Routing to quality-assurance for code review.
All 4 tasks complete and verified. Routing to product-manager for acceptance validation against all 16 criteria.
Feature complete. All 4 tasks implemented, verified, reviewed, and accepted. Exec plan moved to completed.
